#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 24 2003 at 7:46 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) NECRO WITH HASTE LONG LIVE NECROS ITS DARKIST BEFOR DAWN
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 07 2002 at 2:25 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Good haste, shut up.
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 23 2001 at 3:02 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Dont you everget It u stupid newbies ahh
stacking haste
QuoteReply
# Aug 19 2001 at 11:30 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592249503019
2 posts
Off-topic, yes, but this is something that has been bugging me for a long time. When I sell Silver Chitin Hand Wraps, like 1/3 of the tells I get are something to the effect of "do they stack with FBSS?" NO! How many times does Verant have to say, and how many times to players have to say, that haste items do NOT stack?! Yes, I know the exe axe is an exception, as are any other weapons that proc. But that's the difference: it's a proc. Mith 2h + FBSS = same haste as Mith 2h because both are hast items. The Exe Axe's haste is a spell effect triggered by attacking. You can have 1 (one) haste item and 1 (one) haste spell effect going at any given time. If you have more than one of either in action, the faster haste will win out, always. Just wanted to clear this up.
▲ Page top
RE: stacking haste
QuoteReply
# Jan 07 2004 at 8:50 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591763272689
Scholar
40 posts
Actually you can have 4. For Example:
1. Speed of Vallon-62 ENC (Single tgt)or Vallons Quickening-65 ENC (Group) 68% Haste
2. Warsong of Zek- Bard song 60% Haste
3. Worn Haste i.e, Cloak of Flames 36% haste
4. Captain Nalots Eyepatch 20% clicky haste item that stacks with all of the above

I know this exceeds the haste cap but all of these DO stack. If there was no haste cap that woiuld be a total of 184% haste. [:jawdrop]

Just my 2 CP [:twocents]

Baron Caerberus Craziitraiin
65 Overlord
Keepers of Raging Light
Solusek Ro

Edited, Wed Jan 7 20:54:30 2004
▲ Page top
RE: stacking haste
QuoteReply
# Aug 24 2004 at 2:39 PM Rating: Decent
Lolien
31 posts
Captain Nalots Quickening (Clicky spell haste from Eyepatch of Plunder) does NOT stack with Speed of Vallon or any other spell hastes. It does NOT overwrite eachother, bbut the haste does NOT stack. Ty for the attention :)

Song: Warsong of the Vah Shir: Increase Haste (Above Cap) by 25%.
With WoZ sung with this you can get over the cap, and 25% isn't to be sneezed at.

percentage
QuoteReply
# Jul 17 2001 at 11:09 AM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
It's actually 41% haste, shares best haste in the game status with belt of the four winds, golden sash of tranquility and pegasus hide belt.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 17 2001 at 6:53 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) The rogue sky belt is 60%, not 41%. That's why a lot of rogues think their epic should have better haste on it, since their belts make the effect on their epic useless. Monks also have a 60% haste belt in sky, as do paladins (I think).
RE: percentage
QuoteReply
# Sep 27 2001 at 10:01 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591762861307
View User Forum
26 posts
No, actually all those items are 41% haste, as that is the highest the game engine will allow. Higher haste values are why all the haste items in NToV weren't giving their haste effect.

Remember, the listed haste percentage is the % increase in attacks in any given time.
▲ Page top
RE: percentage
QuoteReply
# Sep 26 2002 at 11:05 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591780647206
108 posts
Wrong :( ... the 49th chanter spell "Swift Like the Wind" a 60% haste.

Or are u saying 41% is the highest Focus Effect.
▲ Page top
RE: percentage
QuoteReply
# Dec 16 2002 at 4:33 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592255664674
24 posts
41% the highest haste effect allowed on an item. spells, focus effects, etc are a whole different deal... which is why bard songs can take you way over the haste cap.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 23 2003 at 11:26 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) The highest item haste is 50%, there's no such thing as highest allowed except what the effect "Haste" is limited at. If you don't believe me I don't give a crap cus you're wrong. But check out spell file with a parser anyway...
Don't you..
QuoteReply

# Aug 03 2001 at 3:05 PM Rating: Default

330 posts
Nope. Items hastes do not stack. The highest haste wins out.

# Dec 25 2000 at 7:15 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Well according to Copelands Stats (www.geocities.com/copelandeq/meleestats.html)
it has a considerable increase from the previous "Top" haste item (Cloak of Flames 26.5%) so I'll take a guess and say its well into the 30's and maybe low 40's in haste %, I am not sure how valid his calculations are but to my experience using his program (Weapon Analyzer) its 90% sure he has done his research or obtained it from a reliable source....lets just say that I would sell my soul and anyone elses soul to have this item!
